zh.Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特
zh.Carnwyllion, Carmarthenshire,, Wales: 英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾
zh.Carnwyllion commote, Carmarthenshire, Wa: 英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gronwy ap Einion於1195年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特時，他的父親Einion ap Llywarch31歲，母親Liliwelddy Ferch Einion50歲。他於1215年與Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1206年在威爾士福林爾享年11歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gronwy ap Einion于1195年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特时，他的父亲Einion ap Llywarch31岁，母亲Liliwelddy Ferch Einion50岁。他于1215年与Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud在威尔士卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1206年在威尔士福林爾享年11岁。

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’. See Eynon and compare Bennion . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Eynon
meanings: Welsh: from Enniaun, an old Welsh personal name ultimately derived from Late Latin Annianus, but also associated with Welsh einion ‘anvil’, taken as implying stability and fortitude. See also Beynon and compare Onion .

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation, borne in the Mabinogi by Goronwy the Staunch , Lord of Penllyn. He became the lover of the flower-maiden Blodeuedd and murdered her husband Lleu Llaw Gyffes , but Lleu was later restored to life and definitively dispatched Goronwy.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Gronwy ap Einion was born in 1195, in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Einion ap Llywarch, was 31 and his mother, Liliwelddy Ferch Einion, was 50. He married Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud in 1215, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1206, in Flintshire, Wales, at the age of 11.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gronwy ap Einion est né en 1195, à Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Einion ap Llywarch, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Liliwelddy Ferch Einion, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud en 1215, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1206, à Flintshire, Galles, à l’âge de 11 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gronwy ap Einion 1195 in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Einion ap Llywarch 31 und seine Mutter Liliwelddy Ferch Einion 50. Er hat 1215 in Carmarthenshire, Wales Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1206 im Alter von 11 Jahren in Flintshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gronwy ap Einion è nato il nel 1195 nel Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Einion ap Llywarch, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Liliwelddy Ferch Einion, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud nel 1215, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1206, nel Flintshire, Galles, all'età di 11 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gronwy ap Einionが1195年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランディフエイサントで生まれた時，父Einion ap Llywarchは31歳，母Liliwelddy Ferch Einionは50歳であった。1215年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでLliwelydd verch Einion Cludと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1206年にウェールズフリントシュアイアで11歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gronwy ap Einion(이)가 1195년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디프이산트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Einion ap Llywarch(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Liliwelddy Ferch Einion(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1215년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1206년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 11세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gronwy ap Einion nasceu em 1195, em Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Einion ap Llywarch, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Liliwelddy Ferch Einion, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud em 1215, em Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1206, em Flintshire, Gales, com 11 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gronwy ap Einion родился в 1195 г. в местности лландифисант, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Einion ap Llywarch было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Liliwelddy Ferch Einion, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud в 1215 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1206 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс в возрасте 11 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gronwy ap Einion nació en 1195, en Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Einion ap Llywarch, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Liliwelddy Ferch Einion, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Lliwelydd verch Einion Clud en 1215, en Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1206, en Flintshire, Gales, a la edad de 11 años.
